market_brief.summary_en: Markets closed in MIXED regime (48.8/100) with SPY and QQQ distribution days at DANGER levels amid fearful social sentiment.
market_brief.watch_points_en: Monitor SPY at $728.99 and QQQ at $706.52 for follow-through after distribution days.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $432.35, down 0.61%, holding above EMA21 at $431.07 with all moving averages aligned and golden cross above. Setup quality A with Stage2 6/7 and RS 84.7 despite neutral social sentiment. Recent posts focus on technical HBM yield testing and supply chain risks like WF6 gas positioning TSMC as key in advanced packaging.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM은 $432.35에 마감하며 EMA21 $431.07 위에서 모든 이평선 정배열과 GC 위를 유지했다. Stage2 6/7 RS 84.7로 셋업 A지만 소셜심리는 neutral. HBM 수율 테스트와 WF6 가스 공급망 리스크 중심의 기술적 논의가 이어졌다.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: EMA21 $431.07 support with upside toward 52-week high

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $192.53, down 1.64%, trading below EMA21 at $205.83 with downtrend structure despite monthly uptrend. Stage2 3/7 and RS 49.6 indicate vulnerability with volume contraction near 52-week high. Long-term AI infrastructure and humanoid robotics narrative stays constructive despite recent pullback.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: NVDA는 $192.53에 마감하며 EMA21 $205.83 아래에서 다운트렌드 구조를 보였다. Stage2 3/7 RS 49.6로 취약하며 52주 고점 인근 거래량 수축 중이다. AI 인프라와 휴머노이드 로보틱스 장기 서사는 최근 조정에도 건설적이다.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Volume contraction near EMA200 $188.74 for potential energy release
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA200 $188.74 근처 거래량 수축 에너지 축적

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $1,132.33, down 6.69%, holding above EMA21 at $1,016.24 with all moving averages aligned and golden cross above. Setup quality A+ with Stage2 6/7 and RS 100.0 in confirmed uptrend. Exceptional revenue surge, 81-86% margins, HBM sold out through 2028, and AI demand locking in $100B backlog via take-or-pay deals.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: EMA21 $1,016.24 support with upside to 52-week high
